w:r.w:t: This document outlines the product requirements for a Marketing Automation Microservice that orchestrates intelligent AI agents to execute end-to-end marketing workflows. The platform enables subscribers to automate content creation and distribution across Instagram, Facebook, and Blog platforms while managing advertising campaigns through Meta and Google Ads integration.

The system leverages AI capabilities (Jasper) to analyze customer demographics, trending topics, and keywords to generate personalized, high-quality marketing content including images, videos, scripts, and written posts. This fully automated approach delivers speed, control, and measurable marketing impact to subscribers operating on a credit-based membership model.
Fully automated content creation leveraging AI for trending topic discovery and content generation
Multi-platform publishing to Instagram, Facebook, and Blog with single-click distribution
Integrated advertising management for Meta, Google, and Instagram Ads
Personalized content based on customer profile demographics and business context
Credit-based membership model providing flexibility and scalability

The Marketing Automation Microservice is designed to democratize professional-grade marketing capabilities for businesses of all sizes. By orchestrating intelligent AI agents, the platform eliminates the need for dedicated marketing teams, expensive agencies, or extensive marketing expertise. Subscribers can achieve consistent, high-quality marketing output with minimal manual intervention.

Modern businesses face significant challenges in maintaining consistent marketing presence across multiple platforms. Content creation is time-consuming, requires specialized skills, and demands continuous adaptation to trending topics and platform algorithms. Small and medium businesses often lack resources for professional marketing teams, resulting in inconsistent brand presence and missed engagement opportunities.

This platform addresses these pain points by providing an AI-powered solution that handles the entire marketing workflow from ideation to publication, enabling businesses to compete effectively in the digital marketing landscape.
Runs a local bakery, manages all aspects of business, limited tech expertise, 35-50 years old
Simple interface, automated posting, local audience targeting, time savings
Independent marketing consultant, manages multiple clients, tech-savvy, 28-40 years old
Multi-brand management, content scheduling, analytics, white-label options
Online store owner, sells handmade products, active on social media, 25-35 years old
Product-focused content, Instagram/Facebook shop integration, ad management
Influencer/blogger, needs consistent posting schedule, creative content ideas, 22-35 years old
Trend discovery, creative variations, cross-platform posting, engagement analytics
Manages marketing for multiple clients, needs scalability, 30-45 years old
Multi-tenant support, team collaboration, reporting, API access
Basic content generation, 2 platforms, manual posting
All platforms, auto-posting, basic analytics, ad management
Priority processing, advanced analytics, API access
Display value proposition and signup options
Present Email/Phone or SSO options (Google, Facebook, Apple)
Activate account, redirect to onboarding wizard
Collect business info, services, products, location
OAuth flow for Facebook, Instagram, Google, Meta
User selects content type (Instagram Post, Facebook Post, Blog Post)
System analyzes user profile (geo-location, services, products, industry)
AI engine (Jasper) identifies trending topics and relevant keywords
System presents content suggestions with customization options
AI generates platform-optimized content (copy, hashtags, CTAs)
AI creates or sources relevant images/videos
System applies brand guidelines and tone preferences
User reviews and optionally edits generated content
User approves content or schedules for later
System validates platform requirements (image sizes, character limits)
Content is published via platform APIs
System confirms successful posting and logs activity
Description: The system must support multiple authentication methods including Email/Password, Phone/OTP, and SSO providers.
User Story: As a new user, I want to sign up using my preferred method (email, phone, or social accounts) so that I can quickly access the platform.
Email signup with password requirements (min 8 chars, 1 uppercase, 1 number, 1 special char)
Phone signup with OTP verification (6-digit code, 5-minute expiry)
SSO integration with Google, Facebook, Apple, and Microsoft
Password reset flow with secure token
Description: Users must be able to create and manage comprehensive profiles including business information, demographics, and preferences.
User Story: As a subscriber, I want to maintain a detailed profile so that the AI can generate personalized, relevant content for my business.
Profile fields: Business name, industry, services/products, target audience
Location data: Geo-location, service areas, timezone
Brand assets: Logo upload, color palette, tone preferences
Competitor tracking: List competitor accounts for trend analysis
Profile completeness indicator and guided completion wizard
Description: Implement a credit-based consumption model where actions consume credits based on complexity.
Description: Subscription management with tiered plans, automatic renewal, and credit rollover policies.
Four tier options: Starter, Professional, Business, Enterprise
Monthly and annual billing options (annual = 2 months free)
Credit rollover: Up to 50% unused credits roll over (max 1 month)
Grace period: 7 days post-expiry before account suspension
Description: AI engine analyzes trending topics, keywords, and hashtags relevant to the user's profile and industry.
User Story: As a subscriber, I want the system to identify trending topics in my industry so that my content stays relevant and engaging.
Real-time trend analysis from social platforms, news, and industry sources
Personalized trend scoring based on user profile (location, industry, audience)
Trending hashtag suggestions with reach estimates
Competitor content analysis and gap identification
Description: AI generates platform-optimized text content including captions, blog posts, and ad copy.
Platform-specific formatting (Instagram 2200 chars, Facebook optimal length, Blog SEO)
Tone customization: Professional, casual, humorous, inspirational
Multi-language support (initial: English, Spanish, French, German)
SEO optimization for blog content (keywords, meta descriptions, headings)
Description: AI generates or sources relevant images for social media posts and blog content.
AI image generation based on content context and brand guidelines
Stock image integration with proper licensing
Brand overlay capabilities (logo, watermark, color filters)
Image editing tools (crop, resize, text overlay, filters)
User image upload with AI enhancement
Description: AI generates short-form video content for social media platforms.
Description: Full Instagram publishing capabilities via Meta Graph API.
Post types: Single image, carousel (up to 10), Reels
Schedule posts up to 75 days in advance
Description: Full Facebook Page publishing capabilities via Meta Graph API.
OAuth 2.0 authentication with page management permissions
Post types: Text, image, video, link, carousel
Schedule posts with optimal time suggestions
Description: Blog content creation and publishing to connected CMS platforms.
Integration with WordPress, Wix, Squarespace, Medium APIs
Rich text formatting (headings, lists, quotes, code blocks)
Inline image insertion with alt text
Description: Create and manage Facebook and Instagram ad campaigns within the platform.
User Story: As a subscriber, I want to create and manage ad campaigns for Facebook and Instagram so that I can amplify my content reach.
Campaign objectives: Awareness, Traffic, Engagement, Leads, Sales
Audience targeting: Demographics, interests, behaviors, custom audiences
Budget management: Daily/lifetime budgets, bid strategies
Ad creative management: Images, videos, carousel, collection
Performance dashboard: Impressions, reach, clicks, conversions, ROAS
Description: Create and manage Google Ads campaigns within the platform.
Campaign types: Search, Display, YouTube, Performance Max
Description: Centralized management of all third-party platform connections via OAuth.
< 30 seconds for text, < 2 min for images
AES-256 at rest, TLS 1.3 in transit
The Marketing Automation Microservice follows a cloud-native, microservices architecture pattern designed for scalability, resilience, and maintainability.
API Gateway: Request routing, rate limiting, authentication
User Service: Authentication, profile management, preferences
Billing Service: Subscription, credits, payments (Stripe integration)
Content Service: AI orchestration, content generation, storage
Publishing Service: Platform integrations, scheduling, delivery
Analytics Service: Engagement tracking, reporting, insights
Notification Service: Email, push, in-app notifications
Ad Management Service: Meta/Google Ads API integration
All third-party integrations follow a standardized adapter pattern with the following components:
OAuth Manager: Centralized token storage, refresh handling, scope management
Platform Adapters: Abstraction layer for each platform (Meta, Google, WordPress, etc.)
Webhook Handlers: Inbound event processing from platforms
Rate Limiter: Platform-specific rate limit management
Retry Queue: Failed request retry with exponential backoff
GDPR: Right to access, rectification, erasure, data portability
CCPA: Consumer rights disclosure, opt-out mechanisms
Data Retention: User data retained 90 days post-deletion request
Third-party Data: OAuth tokens encrypted, minimal scope permissions
Audit Logging: All data access and modifications logged
Data Localization: EU user data stored in EU regions (AWS eu-west-1)
Register a new user account via email or phone.
Authenticate user and return access token.
Initiate SSO authentication flow. Providers: google, facebook, apple
Generate AI-powered content for specified platform.
Publish or schedule content to specified platform.
User authentication (Email, Phone, Google SSO, Facebook SSO)
AI content generation (text, images) via Jasper integration
Meta Graph API access will be maintained with current capabilities
Jasper AI API will remain available with current pricing
Users have existing social media business accounts
Target users have reliable internet connectivity
Payment processing via Stripe in supported regions
Google APIs for Ads and GMB
Jasper AI API for content generation
PRD finalization, UI/UX designs, architecture docs
Auth system, user management, database setup, CI/CD
Content service, AI integration, credit system
M2 (Week 8): Authentication and user management live
What is the pricing for each membership tier?
Which Jasper AI plan will be used? Enterprise or API?
Will video generation be included in MVP or Phase 2?
What are the credit rollover limits per tier?
Is Apple SSO required for MVP?
What languages should be supported at launch?
Are there specific compliance requirements beyond GDPR/CCPA?
What is the support model for enterprise customers?
Should blog publishing support custom CMS via API?
What analytics metrics are priority for MVP dashboard?
AI content generation platform used for text and creative content
Single Sign-On - authentication using third-party providers
Unit of consumption for platform actions
Return on Ad Spend - advertising efficiency metric
JSON Web Token - secure token format for authentication
Largest Contentful Paint - web performance metric
